name: Furina
desc:
"Endless Solo of Solitude" Furina

Perpetual muse of chansons and rondeaux.

item_values.name: Hear Me — Let Us Raise the Chalice of Love!

string_values: Reward for inviting Furina to a duel at The Cat's Tail and claiming victory in a Friendly Fracas with her

list.desc:
Normal Attack

Deals 2 Physical DMG.
Once per Round: If you do not have Seats Sacred and Secular in your Hand, create 1 Seats Sacred and Secular card in your Hand.
list.title: Soloist's Solicitation

list.desc:
Elemental Skill

Furina is currently in the Arkhe: Ousia state. Summons Salon Members.
(When Furina is in the Arkhe: Pneuma state, she will summon Singer of Many Waters instead)
list.title: Salon Solitaire

list.desc:
Elemental Burst

Deals 2 Hydro DMG, creates 1 Universal Revelry.

Universal Revelry

Combat Status
After your active character takes DMG or is healed: Add 1 stack of Revelry.
Duration (Rounds): 2

Revelry
Your side deals +1 DMG. (Including Swirl DMG triggered by Characters)
Usages: 1 (Can stack. No stack limit)
list.title: Let the People Rejoice

list.desc:
Passive Skill

(Passive) When battle begins, create 1 Seats Sacred and Secular card in your Hand.
list.title: Arkhe: Seats Sacred and Secular

list.desc:
Event Card

When in Arkhe: Pneuma or Arkhe: Ousia states, switch Furina's state.
If you have Salon Members or Singer of Many Waters on the field, change their state as well.
list.title: Seats Sacred and Secular

list.desc:
Summon

End Phase: Deal 1 Hydro DMG. If your side has characters with at least 6 HP, deal 1 Piercing DMG to your character who has taken the least DMG, and deal another 1 Hydro DMG.
Usage(s): 2 (Can stack. Max 4 stacks)
list.title: Salon Members

list.desc:
Summon

End Phase: Heal all your characters for 1 HP. If your side has characters with no more than 5 HP, heal the most injured character for an additional 1 HP.
Usage(s): 2 (Can stack. Max 4 stacks)
list.title: Singer of Many Waters

list.desc:
Applies Hydro and can trigger the following Elemental Reactions:

[Hydro + Pyro] Vaporize: DMG +2 for this instance

[Hydro + Electro] Electro-Charged: DMG +1 for this instance, deal 1 Piercing DMG to all opposing characters except the target

[Hydro + Cryo] Frozen: DMG +1 for this instance, the target is unable to perform any Actions this Round (Can be removed in advance after the target receives +2 Physical or Pyro DMG)

[Hydro + Dendro] Bloom: DMG +1 for this instance, creates a [Dendro Core] that grants +2 DMG to the next instance of Pyro or Electro DMG
list.title: Hydro DMG

list.desc:
Physical DMG
Physical DMG will not apply any Elements, nor can it engage in Elemental Reactions.

Piercing DMG
Piercing DMG cannot be increased by any bonuses, but cannot be defended against using Shields or DMG Immunity either.

Usage(s)
After this card's effect is triggered, 1 Usage of it will be consumed.
This card will be discarded immediately once it has 0 Usages remaining.

Duration (Rounds)
Each time you reach the end of a Round, Duration (Rounds) -1.
This card will be discarded immediately once Duration (Rounds) runs out.
list.title: Detailed Rules

list.imgDesc:
Elemental Burst

Let the People Rejoice

Elemental Burst

Let the People Rejoice

content.text: Can also be exchanged using a
"Oh, so you're my opponent this time around? Excellent, this will be a thrilling match!"
Hint: Furina's deck has "HP Change" as its theme. Her Character Cards and Action Cards all have the potential to benefit from "HP Changes."

content.name: "Hear Me — Let Us Raise the Chalice of Love!"

content.text: Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle

content.name: "Hear Me — Let Us Raise the Chalice of Love!"

content.text: "Huh... I didn't think there'd be so many tricks to playing cards! Very well, I acknowledge your skill... Now then, show me more!"
Special Rule: "Furina" starts with the Talent Card "Hear Me — Let Us Raise the Chalice of Love!" equipped.
Complete 3 challenge objective(s) in Furina: Friendly
"Oh, so you're my opponent this time around? Excellent, this will be a thrilling match!"
Hint: Furina's deck has "HP Change" as its theme. Her Character Cards and Action Cards all have the potential to benefit from "HP Changes."
